name: Creamy Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 medium potatoes, peeled and thinly sliced
1 can condensed cheddar cheese soup (10.75 oz), undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl; mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
3. Cover and bake at 350°F for 70-75 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
4. Remove cover and bake an additional 10-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
